---
title: "6.5 Feature Selection Imputed"
author: "Justin Guerra"
date: "2026-05-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(glmnet)
library(caret)
library(dplyr)
library(foreach)
library(doParallel)
library(properties)

# =============================
# 0. Paths
# =============================
prop <- read.properties("data.properties")
data_folder <- prop$data_folder

base_output <- "C:/Users/justi/OneDrive/Desktop/feature-selection/min_node_size_2/"
dir.create(base_output, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

impute_path <- "C:/Users/justi/OneDrive/Desktop/Malnutrition_Project/infant_malnutrition_stratification/MICE Imputation Sensitivity analysis min_nodes_size_2/imputed_datasets_min_node_size_2/"

files <- list.files(impute_path, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)

# =============================
# PARALLEL SETUP
# =============================
n_cores <- max(1, parallel::detectCores() - 2)
cl <- makeCluster(n_cores)
registerDoParallel(cl)

# =============================
# LOOP OVER IMPUTATIONS (PARALLEL)
# =============================
results <- foreach(i = seq_along(files),
                   .packages = c("glmnet", "caret", "dplyr")) %dopar% {
  
  cat("Running imputation:", i, "\n")
  
  # ----------------------------
  # Load dataset
  # ----------------------------
  df <- read.csv(files[i], stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  
  # =============================
  # FOLDER NAME BASED ON FILE NAME
  # =============================
  file_id <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(files[i]))
  file_id <- gsub("[^[:alnum:]_\\-]", "_", file_id)  # safety cleanup
  
  mdl_folder_i <- file.path(base_output, file_id)
  dir.create(mdl_folder_i, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  # =============================
  # 1. Prepare predictors
  # =============================
  if (!"ciaf" %in% names(df)) {
    stop(paste("ciaf column not found in file:", files[i]))
  }
  
  response <- df$ciaf
  predictors <- df %>% dplyr::select(-ciaf)
  
  predictors <- predictors %>% mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))
  
  predictors <- predictors %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.), mean(., na.rm = TRUE), .)))
  
  predictors <- predictors %>% select_if(~ var(.) != 0)
  
  writeLines(colnames(predictors),
             file.path(mdl_folder_i, "all_predictor_names.txt"))
  
  # =============================
  # 2. Correlation check
  # =============================
  cor_threshold <- 0.5
  cmat <- cor(predictors)
  
  cor_df <- as.data.frame(as.table(cmat))
  
  high_cor_pairs <- cor_df %>%
    filter(abs(Freq) > cor_threshold & Var1 != Var2) %>%
    arrange(desc(abs(Freq)))
  
  write.csv(high_cor_pairs,
            file.path(mdl_folder_i, "all_predictor_cor.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  # =============================
  # 3. Remove redundant variables
  # =============================
  redvar_file <- file.path(base_output, "redundant_predictors.txt")
  
  if (file.exists(redvar_file)) {
    redundant_vars <- readLines(redvar_file)
    predictors <- predictors %>% dplyr::select(-any_of(redundant_vars))
  }
  
  # =============================
  # 4. Split data
  # =============================
  set.seed(2387)
  
  predictors_matrix <- as.matrix(predictors)
  
  sel_index <- createDataPartition(response, p = 0.34, list = FALSE)
  
  remaining_index <- setdiff(seq_along(response), sel_index)
  
  train_index <- createDataPartition(response[remaining_index], p = 0.5, list = FALSE)
  train_index <- remaining_index[train_index]
  test_index <- setdiff(remaining_index, train_index)
  
  sel_predictors <- predictors_matrix[sel_index, ]
  train_predictors <- predictors_matrix[train_index, ]
  test_predictors <- predictors_matrix[test_index, ]
  
  sel_response <- response[sel_index]
  train_response <- response[train_index]
  test_response <- response[test_index]
  
  # =============================
  # 5. LASSO feature selection
  # =============================
  sel_predictors <- scale(sel_predictors)
  
  lasso_model <- cv.glmnet(sel_predictors, sel_response,
                           alpha = 1,
                           family = "binomial",
                           nfolds = 5)
  
  best_lambda <- lasso_model$lambda.min
  coefficients <- coef(lasso_model, s = best_lambda)
  
  selected_features <- rownames(coefficients)[as.vector(coefficients != 0)]
  selected_features <- setdiff(selected_features, "(Intercept)")
  
  writeLines(selected_features,
             file.path(mdl_folder_i, "sel_predictor_names.txt"))
  
  # =============================
  # 6. Train model
  # =============================
  selected_train_predictors <- train_predictors[, selected_features, drop = FALSE]
  
  train_model <- glmnet(selected_train_predictors,
                        train_response,
                        alpha = 1,
                        lambda = best_lambda,
                        family = "binomial")
  
  coef_matrix <- coef(train_model)
  
  coef_df <- as.data.frame(as.matrix(coef_matrix))
  coef_df <- cbind(Variable = rownames(coef_df), coef_df)
  colnames(coef_df)[2] <- "Coefficient"
  
  write.csv(coef_df,
            file.path(mdl_folder_i, "new_model_coeff.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  # =============================
  # 7. GLM refit for CI
  # =============================
  selected <- rownames(coef_matrix)[as.vector(coef_matrix != 0)]
  selected <- setdiff(selected, "(Intercept)")
  
  train_model_selected <- selected_train_predictors[, selected, drop = FALSE]
  
  glm_fit <- glm(train_response ~ .,
                 data = as.data.frame(train_model_selected),
                 family = "binomial")
  
  confidence_intervals <- confint(glm_fit)
  
  write.csv(confidence_intervals,
            file.path(mdl_folder_i, "new_confidence_intervals.csv"),
            row.names = TRUE)
  
  # =============================
  # 8. Save objects
  # =============================
  save(train_model,
       file = file.path(mdl_folder_i, "train_model.rda"))
  
  save(test_predictors,
       file = file.path(mdl_folder_i, "test_predictors.rda"))
  
  save(test_response,
       file = file.path(mdl_folder_i, "test_response.rda"))
  
  # =============================
  # 9. Save CSVs
  # =============================
  write.csv(as.data.frame(selected_train_predictors),
            file.path(mdl_folder_i, "train_predictors.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  write.csv(data.frame(train_response = train_response),
            file.path(mdl_folder_i, "train_response.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  selected_test_predictors <- test_predictors[, selected_features, drop = FALSE]
  
  write.csv(as.data.frame(selected_test_predictors),
            file.path(mdl_folder_i, "test_predictors.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  write.csv(data.frame(test_response = test_response),
            file.path(mdl_folder_i, "test_response.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
}

# =============================
# CLEAN UP
# =============================
stopCluster(cl)
```
